## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `RTK.md`, and relevant OpenSpec specs.
- [ ] The proposal was approved, or this is a documented OpenSpec exemption.
- [ ] Behavior changes include spec/test updates and scenario references where practical.
- [ ] New UI text is present in both locales; no TypeScript `any` was added.
- [ ] I documented what I did not test and did not include secrets/private data.
- [ ] Agent instruction changes update every adapter listed in `AGENTS.md`.
